system.description: The character is highly skilled in a civil profession, such as an advocate, broker, or scribe and can earn 25gp per month from practicing this profession. Furthermore, when making a throw related to this profession, the character gains Advantage. Note that this Trait can never augment Melee Combat, Archery, Artillery, Sorcery, Alchemy, or Artifice.
system.shortdescr: Earn 25gp/month from profession; Advantage on related throws.
